title: Food Info Tooltips
description: This is a simple Fabric mod, which adds food information (like Hunger & Saturation), to food-items' tooltip!
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

This is a simple mod for the Fabric Mod Loader, that displays Food-Item's values as a part of their tooltip. The values that are displayed in the tooltip are:

1. Hunger
2. Saturation
<hr>

Visit this mod's **Gallery Tab**, to get a visual of this mod.
